message:
refactor(node): extract helper methods and add input validation in lane router

Major refactoring of the lane router module (~350 insertions, ~150 deletions)
to improve code clarity, reduce duplication, and add safety validation.

New constants:
- MAX_OPERATION_ID_LEN (256): Bounds check for operation ID length
- MAX_QUEUE_WAIT_SAMPLES (1024): Cap on queue wait time sample history

Extracted helper methods:
- lane_config(): Centralized lane configuration lookup replacing repeated
  HashMap access patterns throughout the router
- lane_state() / lane_state_mut(): Type-safe accessors for per-lane
  runtime state, eliminating raw map access with potential missing-key
  panics
- background_in_flight(): Consolidated check for outstanding background
  operations across lane slots

Input validation:
- Empty check + length limit for operation_id on enqueue, preventing
  resource exhaustion from oversized identifiers
- Queue wait sample history bounded to MAX_QUEUE_WAIT_SAMPLES with
  automatic draining

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
